title: Building Enhancer
description: Fabric 1.21.1 modpack made to enhance Vanilla with building-related features. Design in Creative, build in Survival!
body:
# Building Enhancer ![Banner of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fef227d9eeb8e9fc3020f694fabd28ef33c82b49_0.webp) ## About Building Enhancer is mainly made for Survival with many build-related mods.
You can build, design and terraform in Creative, make a schematic and build it back in Survival.
There are many structures to explore, and all three dimensions are completely revamped.
A complete skill tree system is implemented so you can develop combat/mining competences.
You can absolutely play this modpack in multiplayer, [Lootr](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr) was added so each player can have some loot in chests.
Quality of Life mods were included so they make your life easier.
## Main Mods * [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone) * [Better Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) * [Nullscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/nullscape) * [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)* * [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) * [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom) * [Pufferfish's Skills](https://modrinth.com/mod/skills) * [Excessive Building](https://modrinth.com/mod/excessive-building) ## Warning \*Please note that even though the mod Farmer's Delight Refabricated has a 1.21.1 version, it is not usable yet, therefore, it is disabled, so do not enable it, until it is ready (there will be an update for that)
